# Examples

Worked examples illustrating STIsim features. Each example is a runnable Jupyter notebook — download and adapt to your own use case.

::: {.cards}

::: {.card .example-card}
::: {.card-body}

#### 💊 Modeling ART interruptions {.card-title}

---

![](art_interruptions_thumb.png){width=280px}

Simulate exogenous shocks to ART coverage using mixed-format DataFrames. Build scenario-specific coverage, run counterfactuals, and compare outcomes.

[→ Open example](art_interruptions.qmd)

<span class="card-meta">🏷️ *New in v1.5.3* · 🕘 *~30s*</span>

:::
:::

:::
